## Verses (43)

| # | Basic English Bible | Compare |
|---|---|---|
| [1](BBE.md#v1) | O give praise to the Lord, for he is good: for his mercy is unchanging for ever. | [WEB](WEB.md#v1) · [KJV](KJV.md#v1) · [ASV](ASV.md#v1) |
| [2](BBE.md#v2) | Let those whose cause the Lord has taken up say so, his people whom he has taken out of the hands of their haters; | [WEB](WEB.md#v2) · [KJV](KJV.md#v2) · [ASV](ASV.md#v2) |
| [3](BBE.md#v3) | Making them come together out of all the lands, from the east and from the west, from the north and from the south. | [WEB](WEB.md#v3) · [KJV](KJV.md#v3) · [ASV](ASV.md#v3) |
| [4](BBE.md#v4) | They were wandering in the waste places; they saw no way to a resting-place. | [WEB](WEB.md#v4) · [KJV](KJV.md#v4) · [ASV](ASV.md#v4) |
| [5](BBE.md#v5) | Their souls became feeble for need of food and drink. | [WEB](WEB.md#v5) · [KJV](KJV.md#v5) · [ASV](ASV.md#v5) |
| [6](BBE.md#v6) | Then they sent up their cry to the Lord in their sorrow, and he gave them salvation out of all their troubles; | [WEB](WEB.md#v6) · [KJV](KJV.md#v6) · [ASV](ASV.md#v6) |
| [7](BBE.md#v7) | Guiding them in the right way, so that they might come into the town of their resting-place. | [WEB](WEB.md#v7) · [KJV](KJV.md#v7) · [ASV](ASV.md#v7) |
| [8](BBE.md#v8) | Let men give praise to the Lord for his mercy, and for the wonders which he does for the children of men! | [WEB](WEB.md#v8) · [KJV](KJV.md#v8) · [ASV](ASV.md#v8) |
| [9](BBE.md#v9) | He gives its desire to the unresting soul, so that it is full of good things. | [WEB](WEB.md#v9) · [KJV](KJV.md#v9) · [ASV](ASV.md#v9) |
| [10](BBE.md#v10) | Those who were in the dark, in the black night, in chains of sorrow and iron; | [WEB](WEB.md#v10) · [KJV](KJV.md#v10) · [ASV](ASV.md#v10) |
| [11](BBE.md#v11) | Because they went against the words of God, and gave no thought to the laws of the Most High: | [WEB](WEB.md#v11) · [KJV](KJV.md#v11) · [ASV](ASV.md#v11) |
| [12](BBE.md#v12) | So that he made their hearts weighted down with grief; they were falling, and had no helper. | [WEB](WEB.md#v12) · [KJV](KJV.md#v12) · [ASV](ASV.md#v12) |
| [13](BBE.md#v13) | Then they sent up their cry to the Lord in their sorrow, and he gave them salvation out of all their troubles. | [WEB](WEB.md#v13) · [KJV](KJV.md#v13) · [ASV](ASV.md#v13) |
| [14](BBE.md#v14) | He took them out of the dark and the black night, and all their chains were broken. | [WEB](WEB.md#v14) · [KJV](KJV.md#v14) · [ASV](ASV.md#v14) |
| [15](BBE.md#v15) | Let men give praise to the Lord for his mercy, and for the wonders which he does for the children of men! | [WEB](WEB.md#v15) · [KJV](KJV.md#v15) · [ASV](ASV.md#v15) |
| [16](BBE.md#v16) | The doors of brass are broken by his arm, and the bands of iron are cut in two. | [WEB](WEB.md#v16) · [KJV](KJV.md#v16) · [ASV](ASV.md#v16) |
| [17](BBE.md#v17) | Foolish men, because of their sins, and because of their wrongdoing, are troubled; | [WEB](WEB.md#v17) · [KJV](KJV.md#v17) · [ASV](ASV.md#v17) |
| [18](BBE.md#v18) | They are disgusted by all food, and they come near to the doors of death. | [WEB](WEB.md#v18) · [KJV](KJV.md#v18) · [ASV](ASV.md#v18) |
| [19](BBE.md#v19) | Then they send up their cry to the Lord in their sorrow, and he gives them salvation out of all their troubles. | [WEB](WEB.md#v19) · [KJV](KJV.md#v19) · [ASV](ASV.md#v19) |
| [20](BBE.md#v20) | He sent his word and made them well, and kept them safe from the underworld. | [WEB](WEB.md#v20) · [KJV](KJV.md#v20) · [ASV](ASV.md#v20) |
| [21](BBE.md#v21) | Let men give praise to the Lord for his mercy, and for the wonders which he does for the children of men! | [WEB](WEB.md#v21) · [KJV](KJV.md#v21) · [ASV](ASV.md#v21) |
| [22](BBE.md#v22) | Let them make offerings of praise, giving news of his works with cries of joy. | [WEB](WEB.md#v22) · [KJV](KJV.md#v22) · [ASV](ASV.md#v22) |
| [23](BBE.md#v23) | Those who go down to the sea in ships, who do business in the great waters; | [WEB](WEB.md#v23) · [KJV](KJV.md#v23) · [ASV](ASV.md#v23) |
| [24](BBE.md#v24) | They see the works of the Lord, and his wonders in the deep. | [WEB](WEB.md#v24) · [KJV](KJV.md#v24) · [ASV](ASV.md#v24) |
| [25](BBE.md#v25) | For at his word comes up the storm-wind, lifting high the waves. | [WEB](WEB.md#v25) · [KJV](KJV.md#v25) · [ASV](ASV.md#v25) |
| [26](BBE.md#v26) | The sailors go up to heaven, and down into the deep; their souls are wasted because of their trouble. | [WEB](WEB.md#v26) · [KJV](KJV.md#v26) · [ASV](ASV.md#v26) |
| [27](BBE.md#v27) | They are turned here and there, rolling like a man who is full of wine; and all their wisdom comes to nothing. | [WEB](WEB.md#v27) · [KJV](KJV.md#v27) · [ASV](ASV.md#v27) |
| [28](BBE.md#v28) | Then they send up their cry to the Lord in their sorrow, and he gives them salvation out of all their troubles. | [WEB](WEB.md#v28) · [KJV](KJV.md#v28) · [ASV](ASV.md#v28) |
| [29](BBE.md#v29) | He makes the storm into a calm, so that the waves are at peace. | [WEB](WEB.md#v29) · [KJV](KJV.md#v29) · [ASV](ASV.md#v29) |
| [30](BBE.md#v30) | Then they are glad, because the sea is quiet, and he takes them to the harbour of their desire. | [WEB](WEB.md#v30) · [KJV](KJV.md#v30) · [ASV](ASV.md#v30) |
| [31](BBE.md#v31) | Let men give praise to the Lord for his mercy, and for the wonders which he does for the children of men! | [WEB](WEB.md#v31) · [KJV](KJV.md#v31) · [ASV](ASV.md#v31) |
| [32](BBE.md#v32) | Let them give glory to him in the meeting of the people, and praise among the chiefs. | [WEB](WEB.md#v32) · [KJV](KJV.md#v32) · [ASV](ASV.md#v32) |
| [33](BBE.md#v33) | He makes rivers into waste places, and springs of water into a dry land; | [WEB](WEB.md#v33) · [KJV](KJV.md#v33) · [ASV](ASV.md#v33) |
| [34](BBE.md#v34) | He makes a fertile country into a salt waste, because of the sins of those who are living there. | [WEB](WEB.md#v34) · [KJV](KJV.md#v34) · [ASV](ASV.md#v34) |
| [35](BBE.md#v35) | He makes a waste land into a place of water, and a dry land into water-springs. | [WEB](WEB.md#v35) · [KJV](KJV.md#v35) · [ASV](ASV.md#v35) |
| [36](BBE.md#v36) | And there he gives the poor a resting-place, so that they may make themselves a town; | [WEB](WEB.md#v36) · [KJV](KJV.md#v36) · [ASV](ASV.md#v36) |
| [37](BBE.md#v37) | And put seed in the fields and make vine-gardens, to give them fruit. | [WEB](WEB.md#v37) · [KJV](KJV.md#v37) · [ASV](ASV.md#v37) |
| [38](BBE.md#v38) | He gives them his blessing so that they are increased greatly, and their cattle do not become less. | [WEB](WEB.md#v38) · [KJV](KJV.md#v38) · [ASV](ASV.md#v38) |
| [39](BBE.md#v39) | And when they are made low, and crushed by trouble and sorrow, | [WEB](WEB.md#v39) · [KJV](KJV.md#v39) · [ASV](ASV.md#v39) |
| [40](BBE.md#v40) | He puts an end to the pride of kings, and sends them wandering in the waste lands where there is no way. | [WEB](WEB.md#v40) · [KJV](KJV.md#v40) · [ASV](ASV.md#v40) |
| [41](BBE.md#v41) | But he puts the poor man on high from his troubles, and gives him families like a flock. | [WEB](WEB.md#v41) · [KJV](KJV.md#v41) · [ASV](ASV.md#v41) |
| [42](BBE.md#v42) | The upright see it and are glad: the mouth of the sinner is stopped. | [WEB](WEB.md#v42) · [KJV](KJV.md#v42) · [ASV](ASV.md#v42) |
| [43](BBE.md#v43) | Let the wise give thought to these things, and see the mercies of the Lord. | [WEB](WEB.md#v43) · [KJV](KJV.md#v43) · [ASV](ASV.md#v43) |
